properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: Extremely rare drug of the 2C-X family. An extremely long lasting substance. Is nearly as potent as its amphetamine counter-part, Ganesha. Yet is said to have very little visual activity.
properties.warning: Note this is a very long lasting compound that can be very hard on the body.
